name: Siteminder Limited
analysis: SDR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 47% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$4.0400. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$4.2500, stop A$3.3759, target A$6.1700 (2.20:1) — then trail it.
